lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: You're late again.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: I had to stay.

lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: You look dead.

lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: Hey — today at school everyone was talking about the tryouts and the new season that's coming. You're gonna go try out in a couple of days right?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: You can't give up.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I've seen you play. You're so good.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: I don't know yet. But I probably will.

lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: You better. I'm tired of eating rice and beans almost every day.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Yeah. You say this every year. And every year, you still go.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: Yeah, you're right.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: Otto can I talk to you?

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: I'm leaving. I got selected.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: The government selected me to be a model. I'm going to the capital.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: Otto, I deserve more. I can't wait forever.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: You've been trying for years. And you're still here.

lines.speaker: Morgan
lines.text: You need to fix yourself. I can do better.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: She leaves. Otto stays standing.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Early morning. Otto wakes up. Eats hard-boiled eggs. Chugs a bottle of electrolytes.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You trying out?

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: ID.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Otto hands it over. The soldier scans it.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You look weak. But you're on the list. Go on.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: Listen up.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: If you're here to dream — leave now.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: No one moves.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: And if you made the team last year — that means nothing.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Whistle blows. FADE OUT.
